name: Monash and Me: Peter Greste on Australia's Great Commander
original_name: Monash and Me: Peter Greste on Australia's Great Commander
overview: Walkley award-winning investigative journalist and war correspondent Peter Greste embarks on a journey to demystify the story of Australia's Great War hero, Sir John Monash.

trailers.title: Monash and Me: Peter Greste On Australia’s Great Commander
